lines.raw: What was the joke? | 笑话是什么？

lines.chinese: “为结束我们的特别新闻快报，”
lines.raw: 'To end our special news bulletin,' | “为结束我们的特别新闻快报，”

lines.english: said the voice of the television announcer, 'we're going over to the macaroni fields of Calabria.
lines.chinese: 电视播音员的声音说道，“我们现在转向卡拉布里亚的通心粉田。”
lines.raw: said the voice of the television announcer, 'we're going over to the macaroni fields of Calabria. | 电视播音员的声音说道，“我们现在转向卡拉布里亚的通心粉田。”

lines.english: Macaroni has been grown in this area for over six hundred years.
lines.chinese: 通心粉在这片区域种植已有六百多年了。
lines.raw: Macaroni has been grown in this area for over six hundred years. | 通心粉在这片区域种植已有六百多年了。

lines.english: Two of the leading growers Giuseppe Moldova and Riccardo Brabante,
lines.chinese: 两位主要的种植者朱塞佩·摩尔多瓦和里卡尔多·布拉班特，
lines.raw: Two of the leading growers Giuseppe Moldova and Riccardo Brabante, | 两位主要的种植者朱塞佩·摩尔多瓦和里卡尔多·布拉班特，

lines.english: tell me that they have been expecting a splendid crop this year and harvesting has begun earlier than usual.
lines.chinese: 告诉我他们今年预计会有一个丰收，而且收割比往常开始得早。
lines.raw: tell me that they have been expecting a splendid crop this year and harvesting has begun earlier than usual. | 告诉我他们今年预计会有一个丰收，而且收割比往常开始得早。

lines.english: Here you can see two workers who, between them,
lines.chinese: 在这里你可以看到两位工人，他们俩，
lines.raw: Here you can see two workers who, between them, | 在这里你可以看到两位工人，他们俩，

lines.english: have just finished cutting three cartloads of golden brown macaroni stalks.
lines.chinese: 刚砍完了三车金黄色的通心粉茎。
lines.raw: have just finished cutting three cartloads of golden brown macaroni stalks. | 刚砍完了三车金黄色的通心粉茎。

lines.english: The whole village has been working day and night gathering and threshing this year's crop before the September rains.
lines.chinese: 整个村庄昼夜不停地收割和脱粒今年的庄稼，以赶在九月雨季之前。
lines.raw: The whole village has been working day and night gathering and threshing this year's crop before the September rains. | 整个村庄昼夜不停地收割和脱粒今年的庄稼，以赶在九月雨季之前。

lines.english: On the right, you can see Mrs. Brabante herself.
lines.chinese: 在右边，你可以看到布拉班特夫人本人。
lines.raw: On the right, you can see Mrs. Brabante herself. | 在右边，你可以看到布拉班特夫人本人。

lines.english: She has been helping her husband for thirty years now.
lines.chinese: 她已经帮助她的丈夫三十年了。
lines.raw: She has been helping her husband for thirty years now. | 她已经帮助她的丈夫三十年了。

lines.english: Mrs. Brabante is talking to the manager of the local factory where the crop is processed.
lines.chinese: 布拉班特夫人正在和当地加工庄稼的工厂经理交谈。
lines.raw: Mrs. Brabante is talking to the manager of the local factory where the crop is processed. | 布拉班特夫人正在和当地加工庄稼的工厂经理交谈。

lines.english: This last scene shows you what will happen at the end of the harvest:
lines.chinese: 这最后一幕向你展示了收割结束后将发生的事情：
lines.raw: This last scene shows you what will happen at the end of the harvest: | 这最后一幕向你展示了收割结束后将发生的事情：

lines.chinese: 著名的卡拉布里亚通心粉大赛！
lines.raw: the famous Calabrian macaroni-eating competition! | 著名的卡拉布里亚通心粉大赛！

lines.english: Signor Fratelli, the present champion, has won it every year since 1991.
lines.chinese: 现任冠军弗拉特利先生自1991年以来每年都赢得了比赛。
lines.raw: Signor Fratelli, the present champion, has won it every year since 1991. | 现任冠军弗拉特利先生自1991年以来每年都赢得了比赛。

lines.english: And that ends our special bulletin for today, Thursday, April 1st.
lines.chinese: 今天的特别快报到此结束，今天是4月1日星期四。
lines.raw: And that ends our special bulletin for today, Thursday, April 1st. | 今天的特别快报到此结束，今天是4月1日星期四。

lines.english: We're now going back to the studio.'
lines.raw: We're now going back to the studio.' | 我们现在回到演播室。”
